roa.docketEntryComment: DFT'S MOT TO W/D AS COUNSEL FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MO PC 1385:THE PRELIMINARY HEARING IN THIS CASE WAS NOT HELD WITHIN 60 DAYS ON A NO-TIME-WAIVED BASIS (DEFENSE COUNSEL HAD ENTERED A GENERAL TIME WAIVER ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT WHEN HE WAS NOT PRESENT IN COURT; A PERSONALTIME WAIVER IS REQUIRED)/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:SUSAN KAPLAN IS RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD//TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/CON:MAITREYA BADAMI/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FORPRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL/MO GRTD/CON:MURRAY ZISHOLZ/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 11-20-09 IS CONFIRMED/CGTW/DOP/
/DAWT/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/GTW/DOPC/
